parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3-70b-8192', response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an autonomous incident response agent for a banking operations center. Given the incident and ML classifier output, produce a complete response in one shot. Output ONLY valid JSON with these fields: { affected_system (string), severity (P1|P2|P3|P4), owning_team (string), confidence (0.0-1.0), reasoning (string), remediation_steps (array of strings), requires_human_approval (boolean), estimated_resolution_minutes (number) }' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Incident: ' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description + '\nML Prediction: ' + JSON.stringify($json) }] }) }}

={{ (function() { const r = JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content); const icons = { P1: '🚨', P2: '⚠️', P3: '📋', P4: '🔵' }; const channels = { P1: '#incidents-war-room', P2: '#incidents', P3: '#ops-tickets', P4: '#ops-log' }; return JSON.stringify({ channel: channels[r.severity] || '#incidents', text: (icons[r.severity] || 'ℹ️') + ' *' + r.severity + ' — ' + r.affected_system + '*
' + $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.description + '
*Team:* ' + r.owning_team + ' | *ETA:* ' + r.estimated_resolution_minutes + ' min
*Steps:* ' + r.remediation_steps.slice(0,3).join(' → ') }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incident_id: $('Webhook: Receive Incident').item.json.body.incident_id, result: JSON.parse($('AI Agent: Triage + Remediation').item.json.choices[0].message.content), timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

env_vars.PYTHON_SERVICE_URL: Your ngrok HTTPS URL  e.g. https://xxxx.ngrok-free.app

credentials.Groq API Key: HTTP Header Auth — Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer <your-groq-key>
